zh.Menai Bridge, Isle of Anglesey, Wales, U: 英國威爾斯安格萊梅乃 布里奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Einudd ap Llywarch於大約1145年出生在英國威爾斯安格萊梅乃 布里奇時，他的父親Llywarch ap Rhys17歲，母親Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy36歲。他和Gwenllian verch Kenric至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1168年享年24歲。

zh-hans.Menai Bridge, Isle of Anglesey, Wales, U: 英国威尔斯安格萊梅乃 布里奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Einudd ap Llywarch于大约1145年出生在英国威尔斯安格萊梅乃 布里奇时，他的父亲Llywarch ap Rhys17岁，母亲Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy36岁。他和Gwenllian verch Kenric至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1168年享年24岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

en.lifeSummary: When Einudd ap Llywarch was born about 1145, in Menai Bridge, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Llywarch ap Rhys, was 17 and his mother, Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy, was 36. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Gwenllian verch Kenric. He died in 1168, at the age of 24.

fr.Menai Bridge, Isle of Anglesey, Wales, U: Menai Bridge, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Einudd ap Llywarch est né environ 1145, à Menai Bridge, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Llywarch ap Rhys, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Gwenllian verch Kenric. Il est décédé en 1168, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.Menai Bridge, Isle of Anglesey, Wales, U: Menai Bridge, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Einudd ap Llywarch um 1145 in Menai Bridge, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llywarch ap Rhys 17 und seine Mutter Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy 36. Er hatte mit Gwenllian verch Kenric mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1168 im Alter von 24 Jahren.

it.Menai Bridge, Isle of Anglesey, Wales, U: Menai Bridge, Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Einudd ap Llywarch è nato il circa 1145 nel Menai Bridge, Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Llywarch ap Rhys, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Gwenllian verch Kenric. Morì nel 1168, all'età di 24 anni.

ja.Menai Bridge, Isle of Anglesey, Wales, U: イギリスウェールズアングレセイメナイ ブリッジ
ja.lifeSummary: Einudd ap Llywarchが約1145年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイメナイ ブリッジで生まれた時，父Llywarch ap Rhysは17歳，母Rhael Verch Ap Gronwyは36歳であった。彼はGwenllian verch Kenricとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1168年に24歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Einudd ap Llywarch(이)가 대략 1145년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시 멘아이 브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llywarch ap Rhys(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Gwenllian verch Kenric(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1168년 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Gwenllian verch Kenric. Ele faleceu em 1168, com 24 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Einudd ap Llywarch родился около 1145 г. в местности менеи бридж, англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Llywarch ap Rhys было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Rhael Verch Ap Gronwy, 36. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Gwenllian verch Kenric. Он умер в 1168 г. в возрасте 24 лет.
